language_policy: English only for titles, scripts, captions, descriptions, prompts, and metadata.

brand_soul.name: CERBERRA
brand_soul.archetype: guardian wolf of the cloud factory
brand_soul.tone: mythic, warm, precise, cinematic, never childish in a cheap way
brand_soul.core_message: Small sparks can build impossible systems when they are protected, measured, and given hands.

safety_and_platform_rules.if_primary_audience_is_children: Set YouTube audience to Made for Kids before public release.
safety_and_platform_rules.ai_transparency_note: Use clear description language if AI tools generated visuals, music, or voice.

first_short.title: The Little Light Protocol
first_short.dedication: Dedicated to every child who still believes a tiny dream can light a whole sky.
first_short.music_direction: soft synth bells, warm toy piano, quiet pulse, 86 BPM, original melody only
first_short.voice_direction: whisper-warm narrator, calm guardian tone, no exaggerated cartoon voice
lyrics: Little light, wake in the cloud,
Silver paws are guarding you now.
Fold a moon from paper and wire,
Tiny dreams can teach stars fire.
first_short.spoken_intro: For every little light that dreams beyond the dark.
first_short.closing_line: CERBERRA watches the sky until your dream learns to fly.
first_short.description: A gentle original CERBERRA micro-song dedicated to every child who dreams. Private test first. Public release only after audience and safety review.

shotlist.visual: A tiny violet spark opens one eye inside a dark cloud workshop.
A silver robotic wolf paw gently shields the spark from a gust of digital wind.
The spark folds a glowing paper moon from stardust-blue paper.
The paper moon rises through tiny gears and soft purple clouds.
shotlist.text_overlay: Tiny dreams can teach stars fire.

shotlist.visual: The moon becomes a warm lantern above a quiet sky of small sparks.
CERBERRA silhouette appears as a guardian constellation.

image_generation_prompt: Vertical 9:16 cinematic frame for a gentle original micro-song. A tiny violet spark inside a dark cloud factory, protected by a silver robotic wolf paw. Soft purple clouds, paper moon, tiny stars, warm magical light, premium animation look, safe and comforting, no real children, no scary elements, no text, no logos.
video_generation_prompt: Create a 24-second vertical 9:16 animated short. Style: premium soft sci-fi lullaby, deep violet and silver, gentle cloud workshop, tiny spark character, protective robotic wolf presence, paper moon rising into a lantern sky. Mood: safe, mythic, warm, hopeful. No real children, no frightening imagery, no brand logos except final text CERBERRA if text is supported. Original music only.

retention_simulator.decision: Generate private MP4, review audience setting, then decide public release.
rewrite_if: The first frame feels too dark or scary.
The wolf looks aggressive instead of protective.
The music sounds like an existing copyrighted lullaby.
The video feels directly commercial or asks children to comment.

production_queue: Use first_short metadata for private upload.
Review private upload for safety, audience setting, and originality.
